raw_transcript: Most cases are 'uncomplicated,' meaning it's just inflammation and maybe a micro-perforation that the body is handling. But we need a CT scan of your abdomen and pelvis to be sure there isn't an abscess or a large perforation.
final_corrected_note: Most cases are 'uncomplicated,' meaning it's just inflammation and maybe a micro-perforation that the body is handling. But we need a CT scan of your abdomen and pelvis to be sure there isn't an abscess or a large perforation.
